scenes.narration: Yaar, Google ne mujhe String Patterns: KMP / Rabin-Karp pe yahi question poocha tha — 90% log yahi galat dete hain.
Without understanding String Patterns: KMP / Rabin-Karp, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of String Patterns: KMP / Rabin-Karp like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of String Patterns: KMP / Rabin-Karp: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of String Patterns: KMP / Rabin-Karp: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use String Patterns: KMP / Rabin-Karp to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: String Patterns: KMP / Rabin-Karp solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
